2606.25363.title: TheoremGraph: Bridging Formal and Informal Mathematics
2606.25363.paper_summary: Mathematical knowledge is organized around statements and their dependencies, but this structure is exposed unevenly: informal papers cite mostly at the document level, while formal libraries record fine-grained dependencies over a much smaller body of mathematics. We introduce TheoremGraph, a unified statement-level dependency graph spanning both informal and formal mathematics. On the informal side, we parse 11.7M theorem-like environments from mathematics arXiv and recover 18.3M candidate directed dependencies, each labeled by the extractor that proposed it so downstream users can trade coverage for precision. On the formal side, we release LeanGraph, a Lean 4 elaborator-level extractor producing 388,105 declaration nodes and 11.3M typed edges across 25 Lean projects. We bridge the two graphs by embedding generated natural-language slogans into a shared semantic space, linking related statements across papers and across the informal/formal divide; an LLM judge affirms 47,952 such matches above a 0.8 cosine floor, with the judge-acceptance rate rising from 48% across the floor to 87% in the >=0.9 tier. On formal concept retrieval, our name-and-signature representation with graph expansion comes within 0.5pp of LeanSearch v2's reranked Recall@10 (0.775 vs. 0.780) without an LM reranker. We release the dataset, extractors, HTTP API, and MCP interface as infrastructure for mathematical search, attribution, and retrieval-augmented reasoning, available at theoremsearch.com and huggingface.co/datasets/uw-math-ai/theorem-matching.
2606.25363.paper_summary_zh: 數學知識圍繞著陳述及其依賴關係組織，但這一結構的展現並不均衡：非正式論文主要在文檔層面引用，而正式庫則在更小的數學範疇內記錄細粒度的依賴關係。我們介紹了TheoremGraph，一個統一的陳述層級依賴圖，涵蓋了非正式和正式數學。在非正式方面，我們從數學arXiv中解析了11.7M類似定理的環境，並恢復了18.3M候選有向依賴，每個依賴都由提出者標記，以便下游用戶可以在覆蓋率和精確度之間進行取捨。在正式方面，我們釋出了LeanGraph，一個Lean 4展開器級別的提取器，產生了388,105個聲明節點和11.3M個類型邊，涵蓋25個Lean項目。我們通過將生成的自然語言口號嵌入共享語義空間來橋接這兩個圖，將相關陳述連結於論文之間以及非正式/正式的界限；一個LLM評判者確認了47,952個這樣的匹配，其餘的餘弦值在0.8以上，評判者接受率從地板的48%上升到>=0.9層的87%。在正式概念檢索方面，我們的名稱和簽名表示法與圖擴展的Recall@10在LeanSearch v2的重新排序結果中相差僅0.5個百分點（0.775對0.780），且未使用LM重新排序器。我們釋放了數據集、提取器、HTTP API和MCP介面，作為數學搜索、歸因和檢索增強推理的基礎設施，並可在theoremsearch.com和huggingface.co/datasets/uw-math-ai/theorem-matching獲得。
2606.25363.author: Simon Kurgan et.al.
2606.25363.authors: Simon Kurgan, Evan Wang, Eric Leonen, Sophie Szeto, Luke Alexander, Artemii Remizov, Jarod Alper, Giovanni Inchiostro, Vasily Ilin
